## 📖 Affected Page

Link to the specific documentation page or README section.

## 📝 Description of the issue

Is the information outdated, missing, or just confusing?

## ✨ Suggested Improvement

What should the documentation say instead?

## 🔗 Related Code (Optional)

If this is related to a specific PR or feature, link it here.
